name: Tomato Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions, garlic, ginger, chili powder, mustard seeds and cumin seeds in a small amount of water.
2. Cook and stir for 3 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and cook, covered, over medium heat for 10 minutes.
4. Reduce heat and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
5. Serve either hot or cold, as a side dish or on toast as a spread.
